title: Reusable Ink Editorial Illustration
sourceTitle: Empty Coastal Road Editorial Illustration AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable ink editorial illustration with ink editorial illustration with expressive linework, controlled contrast, and magazine-quality composition. ink editorial rendering. over-the-shoulder pose. Subject: adult woman with windblown shoulder-length hair. Setting: empty coastal road with distant cliffs and low clouds. Wardrobe: long charcoal coat, cream scarf, and simple boots. Palette: black ink, warm ivory paper, muted teal wash, and one rust accent. Linework Style: cinematic editorial ink drawing with realistic proportions, sharp contour lines, and controlled wash texture. Pose Or Expression: looking back over the shoulder with calm tension and hair moving in the wind. Subject: Make adult woman with windblown shoulder-length hair the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in empty coastal road with distant cliffs and low clouds. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use cinematic editorial ink illustration layout preserving these mechanics: ink editorial rendering, over-the-shoulder pose, realistic proportions and wind detail. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in cinematic editorial ink drawing with realistic proportions, sharp contour lines, and controlled wash texture. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use black ink, warm ivory paper, muted teal wash, and one rust accent. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

Subject: adult traveler with short hair and a messenger bag. Setting: rainy old city alley with lantern reflections. Wardrobe: dark trench coat, loose trousers, and wet leather shoes. Palette: deep ink black, pale gray paper, red lantern accent, and moss green shadows. Linework Style: high-fashion ink illustration, elegant negative space, expressive brush edges, and precise anatomy. Pose Or Expression: half-turn glance toward the viewer, one hand holding the bag strap. Subject: Make adult traveler with short hair and a messenger bag the clear hero subject.
